Game.Name: Shanghai - Banri no Choujou (Japan) (Rev 1)
Game.plot: Shanghai: Banri no Choujou is a Puzzle game, published by SunSoft, which was released in Japan in 1995.http://www.gamefaqs.com/console/snes/home/571377.html
Game.Notes: Just when you thought your Shanghai stragety was as solid as the Great Wall of China...Three captivating new games with enticing new rules, plus Classic Shanghai for the purist. Play each game in a head-to-head tournament against a friend - or race the clock in a series of games. Perfect your stragety under extreme competitive conditions. Accept the ultimate Shanghai: Triple-Threat challenge.
